details: The agent ran kubectl commands against the cluster (get pods, describe pod, get pvc, describe pvc, get storageclass, get pv, get pvc yaml, get deployment yaml) and correctly traced the full chain: pod db-5bfcfcd584-jcf6z is Pending -> because PVC 'data-cache' is unbound -> because StorageClass 'fast-ssd' does not exist in the cluster (only 'standard' is available). The agent cited the actual error message from the PVC events ('storageclass.storage.k8s.io "fast-ssd" not found') and confirmed the cluster's available storage classes. The complete root cause chain was identified.
